channel_ids.desc: List of channels you wish to update access for. Can only be used if user\_ids is not provided. Both `channel_ids` and `user_ids` cannot be passed at the same time.

user_ids.desc: List of users you wish to update access for. Can only be used if channel\_ids is not provided. Both `channel_ids` and `user_ids` cannot be passed at the same time.

desc: Sets the access level to a canvas for specified entities

errors.canvas_disabled_user_team: Canvas is disabled on user's team
errors.canvas_not_found: The canvas you wish to update permissions for is not available.
errors.channel_not_found: A channel could not be found.
errors.failed_to_update_user_ids: Failed to update the specified user\_ids.
errors.invalid_parameters: One of user\_ids or channel\_ids must be defined, but not both.
errors.restricted_action: User does not have permission to perform this action.
errors.user_not_found: A user could not be found.
